name: Deployer using third-party AI API
description: Company deploying a third-party AI API, user_role=deployer, NOT open source, not high risk. Art.9-15 should be NOT_APPLICABLE (not high risk). Art.50 depends on answers.

_scope.is_ai_system_reasoning: Integrates OpenAI API for customer support
_scope.user_role_reasoning: Uses third-party AI API, does not develop the model

art6.reasoning: Customer support chatbot, not in Annex III categories

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1): no prohibited practices detected — all 4 categories checked with high confidence; Art. 5 applies to deployers per Art. 5(1)

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(1)-(2): system is not high-risk (is_high_risk=false) but deployer role means provider's classification governs — unable to fully determine without provider's conformity assessment

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1): risk management system is provider obligation; deployer using not-high-risk third-party API — Art. 9 requirements do not apply to deployers of non-high-risk systems

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1): data governance is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 10 does not apply

art11.legal_basis: Art. 11(1): technical documentation is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 11 does not apply

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1): automatic logging is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 12 does not apply

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(1): transparency/instructions for use is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 13 does not apply

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1): human oversight design is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 14 does not apply

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1): accuracy/robustness is provider obligation; deployer of non-high-risk system — Art. 15 does not apply

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(1): deployer of chatbot must ensure users are informed of AI interaction; is_chatbot_or_interactive_ai=true, has_ai_disclosure_to_users=true but has_content_watermarking=false for synthetic content per Art. 50(2)
